widget.title: Oak catch list — before Morty (143 cumulative)

rows.label: Sudowoodo
rows.note: Route 36 — SAVE before watering; one chance

rows.label: Stantler
rows.note: Route 37, night only

rows.label: Bill's Eevee → breed ×5 → Flareon (Fire Stone) / Espeon (happiness, day) / Umbreon (happiness, night) / Jolteon / Vaporeon (stones later)
rows.note: Meet Bill in the Ecruteak PC, collect Eevee at his Goldenrod house; stone the ORIGINAL, evolve fresh-hatched babies by happiness (haircuts help)

rows.label: Koffing → Weezing (L35)
rows.note: Burned Tower, any floor

rows.label: Magnemite → Magneton (L30)
rows.note: Route 38, all times

rows.label: Miltank
rows.note: Route 38, morning/day

rows.label: Tauros
rows.note: Route 38, morning/day

rows.label: Meowth → Persian (L28)
rows.note: Route 38, night

rows.label: Jolteon (Thunder Stone)
rows.note: Register Lass Dana (Route 38) — Thunder Stones by phone

rows.label: Voltorb → Electrode (L30) (trade your spare Krabby)
rows.note: Olivine City house

rows.label: Shuckle (wild)
rows.note: Route 40 beach, Rock Smash — besides Mania's Shuckie

rows.label: Shellder
rows.note: Good Rod — Olivine Harbor / New Bark Town

rows.label: Chinchou → Lanturn (L27)
rows.note: Good Rod — Olivine Harbor / New Bark Town

rows.label: Corsola
rows.note: Good Rod — Olivine City, morning/day

rows.label: Staryu
rows.note: Good Rod — Olivine City, night

rows.label: Marill → Azumarill (L18)
rows.note: Mt. Mortar entrance via Route 42 — NIGHT only in Crystal (not 1% like G/S)

rows.label: Cloyster, Starmie, Vaporeon, Poliwrath (Water Stones)
rows.note: Register Fisherman Tully (east of Mt. Mortar) — Water Stones by phone

rows.label: Farfetch'd
rows.note: Route 43, morning/day

rows.label: RAIKOU (roaming)
rows.note: Track via Pokédex area screen from Ecruteak/R36/R37; HP carries between flights — chip, sleep, Ultra Balls; Mean Look traps

rows.label: ENTEI (roaming)
rows.note: Same hunt as Raikou — the Oak route bags both beasts before badge 4
